untranslatable_reason: Signal requires: (1) detection of 'above-the-stomach' candlestick pattern (not available in allowed indicators), (2) yearly high/low position calculation (not provided), (3) explicit breakout direction identification logic, (4) performance metrics (success_rate_bull, average_rise_pct, etc.) that are backtesting outputs not entry conditions. The pattern name and yearly position context cannot be expressed with available OHLC and technical indicators alone.
translation_notes: Attempted translation uses tall candle proxy (range > atr_14), price position near yearly low proxy (price_pos_20 < 0.33 for bull breakouts), and reversal exits. However, the core 'above-the-stomach' pattern recognition and yearly high/low positioning require custom pattern detection unavailable in the allowed indicator set. Author was silent on exit conditions and multiple parameters, limiting precise rule construction.
